contributions: Contributing to the development of VisionTera, an AI-based intelligent video analytics system designed to monitor customer behavior and crowd density in shopping malls and supermarkets.
Implemented a real-time people detection pipeline using YOLOv26m, fine-tuned with the CrowdHuman dataset to improve detection accuracy in high-density environments.
Developed a gender classification model using ResNet50 trained on large-scale image datasets to classify detected individuals.
Integrated facial expression recognition to analyze customer emotions and behavior patterns for business intelligence and analytics.
Built and integrated a full-stack monitoring dashboard using React.js and .NET, enabling real-time visualization of AI detection results, analytics insights, and system monitoring.
Contributed to developing a scalable full-stack application using a clean and maintainable MVC architecture.
Enhanced merchant workflows by designing and implementing new features for order redo requests, order cancellations, and customizable product design reviews.
Refactored legacy code to improve maintainability and troubleshoot bugs.
Documented features and maintained technical documentation for development and operational processes.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams following Agile methodologies to deliver high-quality features.
Gained experience with CI/CD workflows, version control (Git), and modern DevOps practices.
